channel.title: Roger S. Zoh
channel.description: Recent content on Roger S. Zoh

item.title: Crossover design with carryover effect
item.description:
This is my first blog ever!!! ##Introduction

I am currently working on a project with a collaborator here at IU. For simplicity, the projects intends to estimate treatement effects given that all the study patients received all T treatements. For now I will use T to denotes the numbers of different interventions (treatments). This is a clear example of of crossover study where patients move from one treatment to another.

item.title: A Powerful Bayesian Test for Equality of Means in High Dimensions
Functional multiple indicators, multiple causes measurement error models
The negative log-gamma prior distribution for Bayesian assessment of system reliability
Data describing the effects of dietary bioactive agents on colonic stem cell microRNA and mRNA expression
First and second trimester immune biomarkers in preeclamptic and normotensive women
PCAN: Probabilistic correlation analysis of two non-normal data sets
Rapidly cycling Lgr5+ stem cells are exquisitely sensitive to extrinsic dietary factors that modulate colon cancer risk
Comparison of two different estimation methods of wind speed extreme values
